Let $X$ be the point on the side $AB$ of the triangle $ABC$ such that $BX/XA =
9$. Let $M$ be the midpoint of $BX$ and let $Y$ be the point on $BC$ such that
$\angle BMY = 90^\circ$. Suppose $AC$ has length 20 and that the area of the
triangle $XYC$ is $9/100$ of the area of the triangle $ABC$. Find the length of
$BC$.
